decks.notes: The deck is focused on generating a large amount of mana quickly through cards like Dark Ritual and Lion's Eye Diamond, in order to cast multiple spells in a single turn and win through Tendrils of Agony or by using Ad Nauseam. It also has disruption elements like Duress and Thoughtseize to protect the combo. Cards like Veil of Summer and Flusterstorm help protect against opposing disruption. The deck also includes tutors like Infernal Tutor and Wishclaw Talisman to find key combo pieces. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces quickly and win the game in a single explosive turn.

The main idea of this Aggro-UR Tempo deck is to quickly disrupt the opponent's mana base with cards like Wasteland, while simultaneously applying pressure with efficient creatures like Delver of Secrets and Dragon's Rage Channeler. By constantly surveilling and manipulating the top of the library with cards like Brainstorm and Mishra's Bauble, the deck aims to maintain tempo advantage over the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes a suite of counterspells like Force of Will and Daze to protect its threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan, allowing it to close out the game quickly.

The main concept of this Legacy Combo - Storm deck is to generate a large amount of mana quickly through cards like Dark Ritual, Lion's Eye Diamond, and Cabal Ritual, to cast powerful spells like Tendrils of Agony or Echo of Eons for a massive amount of damage. The deck also utilizes cards like Chrome Mox and Lotus Petal for additional mana acceleration, while including Wishclaw Talisman and Burning Wish for tutor effects to search for specific combo pieces. The inclusion of Defense Grid helps protect the combo player from disruption while going off.

The deck focuses on generating a high storm count by casting multiple spells in a single turn to eventually win with a Tendrils of Agony or another combo finisher. It utilizes mana acceleration like Mox Opal and Lotus Petal, along with rituals like Dark Ritual to quickly generate the necessary resources for a high storm count. Burning Wish and Echo of Eons provide additional resources and flexibility, while cards like Chrome Mox and Lion's Eye Diamond help streamline the combo. The deck also includes disruption like Hexing Squelcher and Beseech the Mirror to protect the combo.

The deck focuses on generating a large amount of mana quickly through cards like Dark Ritual and Lion's Eye Diamond, allowing the player to cast multiple spells in a single turn. The goal is to use cards like Burning Wish to search for key combo pieces such as Tendrils of Agony and Runehorn Hellkite. By combining card draw effects like Echo of Eons and Song of Creation with the storm mechanic, the deck aims to cast a high number of spells in a single turn to deal lethal damage to the opponent.

The deck revolves around quickly generating mana and storm count to cast spells like Tendrils of Agony or Burning Wish to win the game. It uses cards like Lion's Eye Diamond, Dark Ritual, and Lotus Petal to accelerate mana production while also utilizing cards like Mox Opal and Chrome Mox for additional mana sources. Other cards like Gamble and Beseech the Mirror help to find key combo pieces, while cards like Hexing Squelcher and Echo of Eons provide disruption and card draw. Overall, the deck aims to create a powerful storm turn and win the game through a massive Tendrils of Agony or Burning Wish finish.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures, such as Griselbrand and Koma, World-Eater, using cards like Thoughtseize, Unmask, and Cabal Therapy. Once the graveyard is filled, the deck aims to bring back these creatures onto the battlefield using cards like Goryo's Vengeance, Animate Dead, and Reanimate, overwhelming the opponent with powerful threats early in the game. The deck also includes mana acceleration cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to ensure a quick and efficient setup for the combo.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage engines. By utilizing powerful spells like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares, along with card selection tools like Brainstorm and Ponder, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while establishing its own threats with cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Geist of Saint Traft. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Murktide Regent and The One Ring to close out the game once control has been firmly established.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize cards like Tibalt's Trickery and Violent Outburst to cascade into powerful spells like Call Forth the Tempest and Throes of Chaos. The deck aims to quickly ramp up its mana through lands like Ancient Tomb and Dwarven Ruins to cast big creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Apex Devastator. By using cards like Creative Technique and Trumpeting Carnosaur, the deck can control the board while also setting up for explosive combos. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful spells and quick mana acceleration.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on winning quickly by overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to apply continuous pressure while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Static Prison. The deck is designed to be efficient and versatile, with a mix of creatures, removal spells like Swords to Plowshares, and card advantage engines like Guide of Souls and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah. By playing smartly and aggressively, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver its opponent to secure a swift victory.

This deck aims to quickly get powerful creatures into play by using the reanimation strategy. It utilizes cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to ramp up mana quickly, while also using cards like Unmarked Grave and Reanimate to bring creatures from the graveyard back into play. The focus is on getting out high-impact creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Overlord of the Balemurk as quickly as possible to overwhelm the opponent. The inclusion of disruption cards like Thoughtseize and Dauthi Voidwalker help to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent while quickly building up a board presence with creatures that have various disruptive abilities. The deck utilizes cards like Aether Vial and Stoneforge Mystic to cheat out powerful creatures and equipment, while also running a suite of removal spells like Swords to Plowshares to deal with threats. With a mixture of aggressive creatures and disruptive elements, the deck aims to control the game and overwhelm the opponent with its versatile strategy.

The main concept of this Legacy combo deck revolves around using artifacts, mana acceleration, and tutor effects to quickly assemble a powerful combo involving Tezzeret, Cruel Captain, The One Ring, and other key pieces like Lotus Petal, Grim Monolith, and Mishra's Bauble. By efficiently utilizing these cards and generating mana quickly, the deck aims to create a dominant board state and overwhelm the opponent with a devastating combo finish. The inclusion of disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Portable Hole help protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The main strategy of this deck is to quickly reanimate powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty, Atraxa, Grand Unifier, and Griselbrand by using cards like Reanimate, Animate Dead, and Shallow Grave. The deck also includes disruption spells like Thoughtseize, Unmask, and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the deck utilizes fast mana acceleration with Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual to quickly cast its spells. The inclusion of Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers and Raucous Theater provide additional value and disruption to the deck's game plan.

The deck focuses on generating a high storm count to cast powerful spells like Tendrils of Agony and Runehorn Hellkite. It utilizes fast mana like Mox Opal and Lotus Petal, along with rituals like Dark Ritual and Cabal Ritual, to generate the necessary mana to combo off. Burning Wish allows for additional flexibility in accessing the sideboard for key cards. The inclusion of Echo of Eons and Gaea's Will provide additional resources and ways to replenish the hand. Overall, the deck aims to chain together spells to create a lethal storm combo and win the game.

This UR Tempo deck focuses on utilizing cheap spells and efficient creatures to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure. It aims to control the tempo of the game by countering threats with cards like Daze and Force of Will, while using creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent to deal damage quickly. The deck also includes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Brainstorm to ensure consistent draws and find key pieces. Wasteland is included to disrupt the opponent's mana base, giving the deck an advantage in the resource management aspect of the game.
